instructions.instruction: Write functions whose output depends only on their inputs, with no hidden state or side effects
instructions.relevant_when: Implementing or reviewing a function that computes a value

instructions.instruction: Pass dependencies (current time, config, I/O handles) as parameters instead of reaching for globals
instructions.relevant_when: A function needs time, config, or external data

instructions.instruction: Return new values instead of mutating the arguments passed in
instructions.relevant_when: A function receives a collection or object to transform

instructions.instruction: Isolate side effects at the edges (functional core, imperative shell)
instructions.relevant_when: A workflow mixes computation with I/O
